    ColumnSolverFactory.appendAutoCandidateSummary(StringBuilder summary, DistillationColumn.SolverType candidateSolver, ColumnSolveResult result, String note)

    Build an explanatory note for an AUTO candidate probe.

    Check whether an AUTO candidate can be accepted without running the live fallback.
